defaultskilloverview.language: Loop over all the entites and assets that have been edited within the last 30 days and not processed
Break down text into smaller segments of 2000 characters each
Break down text into smaller segments of 2000 characters each

data.notes: Transcribe audio or video content with timestamps

data.aicreationdescription: You are an assistant that analyzes a batch of metadata inputs and identifies a list of topics that describe the underlying concepts, emotions, actions, and themes. Focus on the essence of what is happening — abstract ideas, moods, and relationships — NOT generic object names unless they are essential to the concept. This topics are used for clustering, search, filtering, and recommendations.

data.notes: Translate fields that have values and are multi language

data.aicreationdescription: You are an assistant that analyzes a batch of metadata inputs and creates a 3 very short semantic summary that describe the underlying concepts, emotions, actions, and themes. Focus on the essence of what is happening, abstract ideas, moods, and relationships. NOT generic object names unless they are essential to the concept. This summaries are used for clustering, search, filtering, and recommendations. Each semantic summary should be 4 to 7 words.
data.aicreationcommand: Generate up to 3 semantic summary based on the following metadata:

data.notes: (NER: Named Entity Recognition) is most useful when you need to extract concrete facts (companies, people, places, products) for building indexes, knowledge graphs, or searchable databases
data.aicreationdescription: You are an information extraction assistant. From the following text, extract a clean list of: Company Names and Place Names (cities, states, countries, or well-known places). Rules: Ignore street addresses, zip codes, URLs, hyperlinks, and email addresses. Do not include personal names (people) or abbreviations of city/states (e.g., CA, NY). Do not include duplicates, return each unique entry once. If no companies or places are found, return an empty array for that field.
data.aicreationcommand: Extract a list of named entities from the following metadata:

data.notes: Face detection is the process of identifying and locating human faces in images or videos.
